principle: Track what this repo can do, what external stock-investment projects teach, and which gaps block a capability from becoming production-grade.

capabilities.target_state: Every strategy/config/run has a manifest with dataset, features, model, portfolio, risk, report, metrics, artifact hashes, and status.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Standardize experiment objects: dataset -> feature -> model -> portfolio -> backtest -> risk -> report.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: manifests, registry, and manifest gates exist, but not every runner emits the standard manifest yet.
next_actions: Wrap major runners so each writes an investment_cockpit candidate manifest.
Promote registry.csv as the canonical strategy inventory.

capabilities.target_state: Stable internal APIs expose price, fundamentals, macro, news labels, entity metadata, and paper/live scorecards.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Connector-first data access with stable schemas instead of scattered CSV reads.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: stock_investment_data facade exists; major investment modules still need to be migrated onto it.
next_actions: Wire stock strategy modules through stock_investment_data instead of direct CSV reads.
Attach schema checks to every panel consumed by alpha modules.

capabilities.target_state: Universes are versioned, source-attributed, survivorship-aware where possible, and tied to each run manifest.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Treat universe membership as data with timestamps, source provenance, and validation.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: universe hashing and registry exist; every stock strategy manifest still needs universe_id/universe_hash.
next_actions: Backfill universe_id and universe_hash into all existing stock strategy manifests.
Separate research/radar universes from tradable execution universes.

capabilities.target_state: Every stock ranking gets rank IC, bucket returns, turnover, exposure, leakage, cost, and benchmark diagnostics.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Judge ranking quality before portfolio performance; expose IC, turnover, bucket spreads, and exposure drift.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: validation primitives, strict manifest gates, and best-practice selector tear-sheet emission exist; broader stock selector coverage still needs rollout.
next_actions: Make factor-tearsheet mandatory for stock selector artifacts.
Fail promotion if rank IC, turnover, or exposure drift is unacceptable.

capabilities.target_state: Ideas from agents or humans enter a queue, become candidate factors, then pass through leakage, robustness, and portfolio tests.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Use AI to propose features and experiments, not to bypass validation.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: canonical alpha idea queue and factor-tearsheet job generator exist; accepted ideas still need broader automatic feature materialization.
next_actions: Add a generator that turns accepted ideas into reproducible factor-tearsheet jobs.

capabilities.target_state: Agents write thesis, bear case, evidence, contradiction checks, and invalidation triggers; deterministic code owns weights.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Multi-role analyst debate is useful as a research note and veto layer, not a capital allocator.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: thesis register, thesis report, and thesis gates exist; strategy modules still need to attach thesis_id where relevant.
next_actions: Require thesis_id on discretionary radar/paper_candidate manifests.
Connect thesis gate output to promotion reports.

capabilities.target_state: Rankings are converted to constrained weights with caps, exposure limits, turnover penalties, cash sleeves, and benchmark awareness.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Separate alpha ranking from portfolio sizing and risk constraints.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: constrained and benchmark-aware active caps exist; turnover-aware and tracking-risk sizing remain basic.
next_actions: Add tracking-risk and turnover-aware sizing.
Record all constraints in strategy manifests.

capabilities.target_state: Signals, intents, orders, fills, positions, cash, fees, reconciliation, and kill switches are separate artifacts.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Execution is an accounting system, not just a signal file.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: canonical accounting bundle, ledgers, safety config, live-executor safety gate, reconciliation report, and enforcement cycle exist; more strategy runners need to emit full order/fill/position artifacts.
next_actions: Unify target weights, orders, fills, positions, cash, and scorecards under one accounting schema for every strategy.
Make execution_safety checks mandatory for live-adjacent workflows.

capabilities.target_state: Every strategy has status research_only, radar, paper_candidate, deployable_sleeve, or blocked with objective gates.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Promotion is lifecycle governance: reproducibility, holdout, robustness, costs, benchmark, and live evidence.
capabilities.current_read: Strong: doctrine and checks exist; needs wider integration with every candidate run.
next_actions: Make candidate registry status the source of truth.
Require promotion-gate evidence links before status escalation.

capabilities.target_state: One command shows data freshness, active signals, scorecards, capability status, and next operator actions.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: A useful investment OS is a compact operator surface: current book, evidence, gates, logs, health.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: platform status, data status, capability audits, manifest gates, enforcement summaries, operator dashboard report, and non-destructive repo inventory exist; richer UI integration remains future work.
next_actions: Add lightweight HTML or MCP-facing operator view on top of reports/investment_operator/latest.json.

capabilities.target_state: Agents call audited tools for scorecards, rankings, thesis records, data freshness, and capability status.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Agents should use controlled tools with typed outputs; they should not roam across raw files ad hoc.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: controlled stock-investment read tools and query-engine registry entries expose capability, operator, accounting, registry, thesis, idea, decision, data, and repo-inventory reports; MCP server exposure remains future work.
next_actions: Expose investment_agent_tools through the query engine or MCP layer.
Require tool outputs to include artifact paths and timestamps.

capabilities.target_state: Frozen decisions are scored later versus benchmark, transaction costs, drawdown, and thesis invalidation events.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Evaluate decisions forward in time; avoid rewarding retrospective narration.
capabilities.current_read: Partial: frozen decision tracker, enforcement cycle, and user-systemd timer can freeze/evaluate from candidate registry; strategy modules still need richer demotion rules.
next_actions: Run frozen decision evaluation on a schedule after each platform cycle.
Feed frozen decision results into promotion/demotion reports.

capabilities.target_state: Every strategy can explain returns by holding, factor, sector/country, costs, turnover, and failure mode.
capabilities.stealable_pattern: Debug the strategy as a system: attribution, costs, turnover, regime, and failure notes.
capabilities.current_read: Strong: attribution and cost primitives exist; failure-note capture is still manual.
next_actions: Attach failure_mode and root_cause fields to candidate manifests.
Make attribution summaries part of monthly strategy reports.
